title: Draft lineups per fixture with hand-off to the existing selection workflow
description: The planning payoff: on each fixture in the week view, captains can draft a lineup (mull it over), save it, share it with other captains via the URL, and when ready, promote it into the existing admin selection workflow (internal/admin/selection_overview.go) without re-keying names. Directly addresses the cascading player-picking pain point.
acceptance_criteria: Each fixture in the matrix exposes a 'Draft lineup' affordance (cell action or drawer)
Draft shows the four matchup slots (men's, women's, two mixed) and lets the captain assign players from the eligible + available roster
Assignment respects eligibility but is not restricted by division captaincy — any admin can draft for any fixture
Draft is explicitly a DRAFT, not a final selection — it does NOT write into fixture_players
Multiple drafts per fixture allowed (alternative plans); each draft has a name and an author
'Promote to selection' button hands off the draft's player assignments to the existing selection_overview flow — pre-populates the selection form
Once promoted, the draft is marked 'promoted' (audit trail) but not deleted
All drafts visible to all captains (whole-team ethos)

files_to_modify: internal/admin/selection_overview.go — accept a ?from_draft={id} query that pre-populates the selection form
schema_sketch: lineup_drafts(id, fixture_id, name, author_user_id, notes TEXT, promoted_at TIMESTAMP NULL, created_at, updated_at)
lineup_draft_players(id, draft_id, matchup_slot ENUM, player_id, position INTEGER)
design_notes: Drafts are non-binding — no notifications, no visibility to players, no fixture_players writes
Promotion hands off to the admin selection workflow, which remains the single source of truth for committed selections
Consider adding a 'from_draft' audit field on the selection record in a follow-up

testing_requirements: Integration test: create, edit, promote draft; confirm fixture_players is only written via selection_overview, not draft save
Integration test: promoted drafts are flagged but not deleted

context.user_story: As a captain, the cascading week-over-week picking is a pain point. I want a place to mull lineups with my co-captains, save options, and when we're ready, push the chosen one straight into selection without re-keying names.
